case_title: 1020 POST STREET, LLC VS. ALBERTA VUKAS

docket_entries.description: RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 1020 POST STREET, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT VUKAS, ALBERTA AN INDIVIDUAL

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 1020 POST STREET, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VUKAS, ALBERTA AN INDIVIDUAL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1020 POST STREET, UNIT NUMBER 204, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109, **APPLIES TO ALL UNNAMED/UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS.**

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 1020 POST STREET, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT VUKAS, ALBERTA AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
